context.summary: Proof 033 teacher seasoning lesson P033-ROT-003 for SUPPORTED_ROTATION.

task: SEASON mechanism lesson into the pond. Mechanism=SUPPORTED_ROTATION. Domain=conveyor_roller. Observations=roller turns under cartons; the moving part depends on the end cup; dry contact grinds; cartons hesitate. Causal chain=A part must rotate or circle.; A support interface holds the rotating motion.; Friction or abrasion rises at the support.; Motion becomes rough, slow, stuck, or stopped.. Consequence signature=rough motion appears; drag rises; rotation degrades or stops. Return bounded motifs and lineage only.
